text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After claiming her first win as part of Team Sirius, Silence Suzuka's
conquest begins...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's at it again! Silence Suzuka's unstoppable! The rest of the pack
can't catch up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Farther, farther, and farther still! With runaway speed, Silence Suzuka
nabs her second graded race win in a row!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wheeze! ... I can't keep up with that speed of yours!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But what can I do? My normal pace is too slow, and there's no way I
can catch up at the end... Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: One more! One more race! Come on, Suzuka, Spe! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right, fine by me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Can't we at least take a five-minute break?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: She flies down the course right from the start, and then she accelerates at the end too! What an amazing racer, that Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't wait to see what she'll bring to her next race!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well, well, well, Suzuka's really made a name for herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Her winning streak certainly is newsworthy, but her running style itself
seems to be the bigger topic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Although her front running isn't like normal front running. It's
something all her own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Just as people's personalities differ, so too does the running of
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I utilize my stamina to make a move quickly. I can go from fifth place
to first in an instant.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As for Brian, she can maintain her speed for a long period of time.
She conserves her strength until the homestretch, when she lets loose
an explosion of speed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And Rice... She uses her innate stamina in a long spurt to completely
dominate her opponents.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
All of us took time to determine our own strengths and find a running
strategy that utilizes them the best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Conversely, Suzuka's running is more of an ideal than a strategy—one
most of us have written off as impossible.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Jetting out of the starting gate and then racing down the course unrivaled does sound like a dream.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Jetting out of the starting gate and then racing down the course unrivaled does sound like a dream.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yeah, and Suzuka's actually making that dream a reality.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can only hope that we keep seeing that running of hers. I love
watching her make the impossible possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her running doesn't just mesmerize fans, but racers too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scenery she seeks is dreamed of by all Umamusume, and they
want to see her achieve her goal as much as she does.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I hope I'm not intruding.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Did you forget something?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Did you forget something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No. I was just wondering if my next race has been decided.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Knowing my next race will give me a goal to work towards in training,
and um... I'm sure there are other advantages.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka isn't usually the one to bring up her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps this is another sign of her growth.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I was thinking we could aim for the Kinko Sho next.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I was thinking we could aim for the Kinko Sho next.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The Kinko Sho... I believe that one's 2,000 meters.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I understand if that distance worries you, considering you run
your races at full speed.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I understand if that distance worries you, considering you run
your races at full speed.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean medium-distance is impossible. Personally, I
think you can handle it.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean medium-distance is impossible. Personally, I
think you can handle it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If you believe in me that strongly, how could I ever be worried?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm curious to see how far my running style can take me, and
this could be my chance to find out.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you've been making good progress in training already. Trying
new things will only help you grow more!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
If you can do well in the Kinko Sho, you might even be able to take
on the Takarazuka Kinen or the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
If you can do well in the Kinko Sho, you might even be able to take
on the Takarazuka Kinen or the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: G1 races...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Exciting, right? But that means your training will be that much more
intense.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe... That's fine by me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I want to explore my current style as much as I can.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Something tells me... the scenery from that path will be the most
beautiful of all.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be right alongside you. I can't wait to get a view of you
achieving your dream.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be right alongside you. I can't wait to get a view of you
achieving your dream.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll push myself to the limit. Then... we'll both see the scenery we
seek.
